data:
<question>
1. Nina is new.
2. All things that are new are relaxed.
3. All things that are relaxed are new.
What mood does Nina have?
</question>

<question>
1. Yara is relaxed.
2. All things that are relaxed are sparse.
3. Yara is sparse.
What complexity trait does Yara have?
</question>

<question>
1. David is proud.
2. All things that are proud are huge.
3. David is huge.
What size does David have?
</question>

<question>
1. Grace is neat.
2. All things that are neat are funny.
3. Grace is funny.
What personality trait does Grace have?
</question>

<question>
1. Rita is solid.
2. All things that are solid are muddy.
3. Rita is muddy.
What cleanliness does Rita have?
</question>

<question>
1. Paula is curved.
2. All things that are curved are loud.
3. Paula is loud.
What sound trait does Paula have?
</question>

<question>
1. Clara is moist.
2. All things that are moist are rich.
3. All things that are rich are moist.
What taste does Clara have?
</question>

<question>
1. Paula is thick.
2. All things that are thick are nervous.
3. Paula is nervous.
What mood does Paula have?
</question>
